author: y4rr
content: Observation: #![cfg(feature = "http")] on the test file causes unexpected_cfg warning because ferrotorch-llama has no 'http' feature of its own. The hub http feature is always enabled (it's the hub's default, and ferrotorch-llama depends on hub with default features). The fix: remove the cfg guard entirely — the tests compile unconditionally; the #[ignore] attribute is the only CI gate needed. The hf_download_model function is always available because ferrotorch-hub is in [dependencies] with its default http feature.
